headline: IGV Investors: Watch Oracle’s Free Cash Flow as the Real Test of AI Capex Economics
summary: The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (NASDAQ:IGV) closed Friday at $88.20, down 16.5% year to date and 18.9% over the past year, despite the broader AI trade still drawing capital. IGV’s slide accelerated this month after top holding Oracle posted its worst week since the 2001 dot-com bust, dropping 19.4% in five sessions on debt ... IGV Investors: Watch Oracle’s Free Cash Flow as the Real Test of AI Capex Economics

headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Teams With IBM And Red Hat On AI Cyber Threats
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) announced a collaboration with IBM and Red Hat to address AI-driven cyber threats. The partnership focuses on open-source software and critical infrastructure environments. The companies plan to integrate virtual patching with software remediation and coordinated vulnerability response. Palo Alto Networks is a large cybersecurity company with a focus on network, cloud, and security operations platforms. This new collaboration with IBM and Red Hat speaks...

headline: 2 Software Stocks That Are Probably Safe From AI’s Disruption
